queries.feature_definition: Credit history: no credits taken or all previous credits paid back duly.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of a credit history characterized by no credits taken or all previous credits paid back duly to elevated credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical impact of a checking account status indicating no checking account on the likelihood of credit risk realization.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the relationship between savings account balances below 100 DM and the reduction of credit risk exposure.
